name: advance_application
description: Advance a job application to the next stage in the hiring pipeline. Moves the candidate forward from their current interview stage to the next configured stage. The On-Behalf-Of header specifying a Greenhouse user ID is required. The application must be in 'active' status to be advanced.

parameters.name: from_stage_id
parameters.description: The ID of the stage the application is currently in. If provided, the advance will fail if the application is not actually in this stage (safety check).
